calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name.Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing Petitioner's name to Luisa Pinole. Decree signed in open court.,
